title: C37-Cute Dogs
description: This Mod Add Cute Dogs On your minecraft =)
body:
# **_Important informations_**
- Please remember that the mod is in the prototype phase.
- The mod has not been tested on the server and on other versions than 1.21.8
- Download [_Fabric API_](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) on version _1.21.8!!!_
- How To Downlad below only works on the original **_Minecraft launcher from Microsoft!_**
# About the mod
This mod adds cute dog models that can only be spawned in Creative mode from a spawn egg. If you're looking for a mod that lets you spawn cute dogs in your Minecraft home, this mod is up to you! **The mod is in the prototype phase. Please report any bugs on Discord**

# From the author
There will be more and more dogs in this mod as the mod develops, the current state of the mod is deplorable, they will go to the bottom but I am trying to finish it, the current state of the mod as of 7/02/2026 is only one dog and it is broken, so I want to inform everyone that this mod is a prototype!!!
![Ozzy=)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6a12106ba7cbaddfa7f81bb4e3bb72c8de61b51f.png)
Mod Add:
1. OzzyGoldenRetriver
# Coming Soon...
- More Cute Dogs
- And **_MORE_**
# How To Downlad
1. Go to page [fabricmc.net](https://fabricmc.net/)
2. Click Download for windows or Download uniwersal jar (Remeber Downlad [Java JDK](https://www.oracle.com/java/technologies/downloads/) from Oracle
3. Once you have downloaded it, go to np. C:\Users\YourProfile\Downloads and double-click on the file you downloaded
4. Expand minecraft Version and select 1.21.8 (Remember to turn off the minecraft launcher while performing these steps
5. Then click install and wait for it to install
6. Once it's installed, press win + r (i.e. the Windows icon on your keyboard and r at the same time) and type %AppData%/.minecraft/mods and press Enter
7. Now a file explorer window will open, into which you can place the mod's .jar file.
8. Don't forget to download [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) and put it in the mod folder!!!
9. It's time to run the mod. Open Microsoft's Minecraft Launcher. Once it launches, go to the Minecraft Java Edition tab and expand the installation next to the Play button. Find the installation called (something like Fabric 1.21.8) and select it. Then press Play and that's it.
10. Thank You to downlad my mod :)
# [Oficjal Forge Port By Creeperos37](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cute-dogs-oficjal-forge-port)
